paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent change from the prior close and a -31.77 percent change over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 20, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G on July 20, 2026, and 8-K filings on July 15, July 13, and July 9, 2026, with one of the 8-K filings disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
